eventPreCondition: Play if either Aragorn or Denethor, Lord Steward of Gondor, is in play.
eventText:
Recruit five Sauron Regular units and one Nazgûl,
plus one Sauron Regular unit or Nazgûl for each Awakened Sovereign in play,
in Minas Morgul.
combatText: Before the Combat roll, you may inflict and apply up to two hits against your units. Add 1 to all dice on your Combat roll for each hit you inflicted.
